meta.name: Mama Mahoney's
meta.tone: classic american diner, bold reds and whites, retro 50s feel

props.headline: Mama Mahoney's
props.subheadline: Classic American burgers, hand-cut fries, and thick shakes — just like Mama used to make. Serving the neighborhood since 1952.

items.title: Hand-Pressed Burgers
items.description: Fresh never frozen — 100% American beef, ground daily, smashed to order on a seasoned flat-top. Served on a toasted brioche bun.

items.title: Hand-Cut Fries
items.description: Russet potatoes cut fresh every morning, double-fried to golden perfection. Served with our secret seasoning blend.

items.title: Thick Shakes & Floats
items.description: Real ice cream, whole milk, and house-made syrups blended thick enough to stand a straw in. Ten rotating flavours weekly.

props.headline: Pull up a stool. The coffee's always on.

content.headline: Mama Mahoney's
content.cta-headline: Pull up a stool. The coffee's always on.
